בס׳׳ד

Call Anytime

+44 208 200 1110

Leading Food Distribution & Logistics Across the UK and Europe. Global Group has established itself as the UK’s leading food distribution and logistics providers, specializing in bringing high quality brands from across the globe to retailers, hotels and the food service/catering sectors across the UK and Europe. Our Freight & Logistics division is instrumental in delivering unprecedented shipping solutions for Critical, LCL and Temperature Controlled consignments. The Global Foods division has successfully launched a number of private label brands, finding niche gaps in the market, and sourcing quality manufacturers to bring these dreams to consumers the world over. Speak to a representative Welcome to Global Group

Snapshot of Services

End To End Distribution and Logistics.

Since 2006, Global Group has been developing and expanding its services to include cutting edge distribution, industry leading freight solutions in addition to the development of our very own brands. With Global Group, our partner brands can focus on scaling their operations knowing that their inventory is being shipped, stored, marketed and distributed safely, efficiently and effectively.

Global Kosher

At Global Kosher, we treat the brands we work with as partners, not customers. Our team is your team, and we work very hard to ensure that your products are stored, packed and dispatched accurately & efficiently. With a quality team of trained and specialized sales representatives, Global’s partner brands see a strong uptick in sales post onboarding. Strong connections forged with 200+ UK and EU retail outlets allows Global Kosher to promote sales, obtain enviable shelf space and negotiate favorable terms to ensure the ultimate results for our partners.

Global Foods

Global Foods was built to provide the discerning consumer with high quality niche products in a readily available and well presented manner. With strong ties built across the Kosher, Halal and Household sectors, combined with our growing relationships with manufacturers and couriers, Global Foods has rolled out an incredible range of quality products that have since become household standard. We are constantly seeking new opportunities in this space and welcome partners to submit interest via the contact form.

Global Freight

Global Freight was created to fill a much needed void in the logistics and freight forwarding sector. With almost two decades experience in the freight and logistics field, Global Freight has become a recognised partner with leading couriers and freight providers, allowing us to leverage these relationships in favor of our clients and partners who require unique and tailored shipping solutions. With warehousing both in the UK and US, we proudly assist both conventional brands as well as regulated markets with unique freight services tailored for LCL, Critical and Temperature controlled goods.
Our Friendly Team are ready to assist

Global Kosher

At Global Kosher, we treat the brands we work with as partners, not customers. Our team is your team, and we work very hard to ensure that your products are stored, packed and dispatched accurately & efficiently. With a quality team of trained and specialized sales representatives, Global’s partner brands see a strong uptick in sales post onboarding. Strong connections forged with 200+ UK and EU retail outlets allows Global Kosher to promote sales, obtain enviable shelf space and negotiate favorable terms to ensure the ultimate results for our partners.

Global Foods

Global Foods was built to provide the discerning consumer with high quality niche products in a readily available and well presented manner. With strong ties built across the Kosher, Halal and Household sectors, combined with our growing relationships with manufacturers and couriers, Global Foods has rolled out an incredible range of quality products that have since become household standard. We are constantly seeking new opportunities in this space and welcome partners to submit interest via the contact form.

Global Freight

Global Freight was created to fill a much needed void in the logistics and freight forwarding sector. With almost two decades experience in the freight and logistics field, Global Freight has become a recognised partner with leading couriers and freight providers, allowing us to leverage these relationships in favor of our clients and partners who require unique and tailored shipping solutions. With warehousing both in the UK and US, we proudly assist both conventional brands as well as regulated markets with unique freight services tailored for LCL, Critical and Temperature controlled goods.
